candidate.title: Inference-runtime production operations evidence from local vLLM and SGLang sources

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Checked local vLLM captures, SGLang scheduled crawler manifest, SGLang API summary/index, and selected page snapshots for router, admission, rollout, benchmark, tracing, observability, incident, external KV cache, PegaFlow, abort_request, model-gateway, disaggregation, warmup, and regression terms.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing Inference Runtime Infrastructure covered core vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Triton, llama.cpp, ONNX Runtime GenAI, TensorRT, and basic PegaFlow/vLLM RL mechanics, but did not promote router abort observability, PD/Mooncake failure handling, warmup/startup regressions, or benchmark/profiling leads.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md already routed inference-runtime and SGLang pages; no separate page was needed because the durable target is the existing inference-runtime reference plus SGLang corpus reference.

duplicate_checks.result: duplicate boundary for core runtime mechanics; updated only with operations-specific local evidence.
duplicate boundary for corpus scope and caveats; added selected item-level operational leads without changing API corpus counts.
duplicate boundary for design/source mechanics; not repeated as production operations evidence.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: Local raw evidence was sufficient for the narrow operations update; no new primary-source capture was attempted.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Stop before external capture when local evidence is sufficient.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: A full SGLang API refresh with joined comments/review comments is deferred unless a later planner proves page-level scheduled supplement evidence is insufficient.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Do not treat scheduled crawler snapshots as a full refreshed API corpus.

gap_reason: The inference-runtime layer had local raw evidence for external KV-cache process boundaries, rollout/weight-sync control, router abort observability, PD disaggregation failures, benchmark/profiling leads, and warmup/startup regressions that were not fully promoted into curated coverage. Autoscaling, model placement, canary rollout, full postmortems, live trace/SLO artifacts, and optional full SGLang API refresh remain open gaps.
